scripts.build: pnpm --filter @femi/shared build && pnpm --filter @femi/db build && pnpm --filter @femi/server build && pnpm --filter @femi/web build
scripts.dev:server: pnpm --filter @femi/shared build && pnpm --filter @femi/db build && pnpm --parallel --filter @femi/shared --filter @femi/db --filter @femi/server run dev
scripts.dev:worker: pnpm --filter @femi/shared build && pnpm --filter @femi/db build && pnpm --parallel --filter @femi/shared --filter @femi/db --filter @femi/server run dev:worker
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @femi/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @femi/db typecheck && pnpm --filter @femi/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @femi/web typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm lint:styles && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm analyze && pnpm build
